category_sources: Official GitHub README describes wxMaxima as a document-based interface for the Maxima computer algebra system.
source_facts.description says wxMaxima is a cross-platform GUI for Maxima.
display_name_sources: Official project website and GitHub repository use wxMaxima capitalization.
source_facts.homepage is the official wxMaxima developers site.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links screenshots, documentation, compiling instructions, and code documentation.
Official wxMaxima documentation page links online manuals, tutorials, and support resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/wxMaxima-developers/wxmaxima, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it provides menus, dialogs, autocompletion, inline plots, and animations for Maxima.
source_facts.description identifies wxMaxima as a GUI for Maxima.
